sidebar.ctaLaunchDescription: Clone the repo, install dependencies, and your dashboard is live in minutes.
sidebar.ctaHelpDescription: Check out the docs or open an issue on GitHub, community support is just a click away.

signin.title: Sign in
signin.termsAgreement: By clicking sign in, you agree to our
signin.unableToSignIn: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
signin.unableToSignInProvider: Unable to sign in with this provider. Try a different sign-in method.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.termsAgreement: By creating an account, you agree to our
signup.unableToSignUp: Unable to continue. Please try again.
signup.unableToSignUpProvider: Unable to continue with this provider. Try a different sign-up method.
signup.unableToCreateAccount: Unable to create account. Please try again.

forgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot password
forgotPasswordPage.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a reset link.
forgotPasswordPage.rememberedLink: Remembered your password? Back to sign in
forgotPasswordPage.successMessage: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.
forgotPasswordPage.errorMessage: Unable to send reset link. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidDescription: This reset link is invalid or incomplete.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.errorMessage: Unable to reset password. Please try again.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.description: We sent a magic sign-in link to your email address.
checkEmail.instructions: Open the email and click the link to complete sign-in.
checkEmail.missingEmail: Missing the email address? Go back to sign in
checkEmail.resendSuccess: A new sign-in link has been sent.
checkEmail.resendError: Unable to send a new sign-in link. Please try again.

verifyEmail.failedDescription: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.successDescription: Your email address is now confirmed. You can sign in.

verifyEmailSent.title: Check your email
verifyEmailSent.description: We sent you a verification link. Open it to activate your account.
verifyEmailSent.afterVerification: After verification, return to sign in.
verifyEmailSent.resendSuccess: A new verification email has been sent.
verifyEmailSent.resendError: Unable to send verification email. Please try again.

signOutDialog.title: Sign out
signOutDialog.description: Are you sure you want to sign out? You will need to sign in again to access your account.

twoFactor.title: Use authenticator code
twoFactor.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
twoFactor.trustDevice: Trust this device for future sign-ins
twoFactor.backupDescription: If you lost access to your authenticator, use one of your backup codes.

toast.magicLinkFailed: Unable to send the sign-in link. Please try again.
toast.signUpLinkFailed: Unable to send the sign-up link. Please try again.
toast.oauthSignInFailed: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
toast.resetLinkFailed: Unable to send reset link. Please try again.
toast.oauthSignInGeneric: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
